Item i.

Any Cauchy sequence \(\{ c_{k}\}\) in \(C[a, b]\) under the \(L^{p}[a, b]\)-norm has a subsequence which converges pointwise \(a.e.\) on \([a, b]\text{.}\) Furthermore, for any \(\epsilon > 0\text{,}\) there exists an open set \(G\) with \(|G| < \epsilon\) such that \(\{ c_{k}\}\) converges uniformly over \(G^{c}\text{.}\)
in-context
